description: Style Note We know how addictive the angry birds game can be! Tap into the season's most popular video game trend from your phones and PCs into your wardrobe, with this soft spun tee from Angry Birds. The imagery is very in-vogue, channelling the spirit of urban chic into your off-duty ensemble. Style this with your tried-and true favourite denims and boat shoes, or colour block it with another bright hue and add on a pair of ankle-high boots. Product Details Charcoal grey T-shirt, has a ribbed round neckline, short sleeves and print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Wash inside out, with like colours Do not bleach or iron on print Dry in shade Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
